skills.name: Ruler's Judgement
skills.description: Unleashes an inferno of condemnation to ravage the enemy. Grants self 1 stack of Agitation. The applied effect changes based on the number of stacks of Inferno (Undispellable). Removes all Inferno (Undispellable) stacks after attacking. 1 stack of Inferno (Undispellable): Deals 10% increased damage. 2 stacks of Inferno (Undispellable): Deals 20% increased damage. 3 stacks of Inferno (Undispellable): Deals 20% increased damage and triggers Ashen Inferno.

levels.description: Unleashes an inferno of condemnation to ravage the enemy. Grants self 1 stack of Agitation. The applied effect changes based on the number of stacks of Inferno (Undispellable). skills.name: Difference in Class
skills.description: Swings her sword to cleave a planet, attacking all enemies. Inflicts all enemies with DEF Down for 2 turns with a 75% chance. Increases self Action Gauge by 50% and grants self Owner of the Throne (Undispellable) for 3 turns. Grants self a stack of Inferno (Undispellable) for each target hit by a Critical Hit. Stacks up to 3 times.

skills.name: Tyrant of the North
skills.description: Increases Rosaria's chance to grant self 1 stack of Inferno (Undispellable) after using Ashen Inferno by 20% per stack of Agitation, up to 5 stacks of Agitation. Prevents self current HP from dropping below 40% and grants self ATK UP for 1 turn after being attacked by an attack that would take self HP under 40%. The effect that triggers after being attacked occurs once per battle.

levels.description: Increases Rosaria's chance to grant self 1 stack of Inferno (Undispellable) after using Ashen Inferno by 20% per stack of Agitation, up to 5 stacks of Agitation. Prevents self current HP from dropping below 40% and grants self ATK UP for 1 turn after being attacked by an attack that would take self HP under 40%. The effect that triggers after being attacked occurs once per battle.
